The '''''Backbreaker''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigate]] in service to [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
